nova.tests package

Submodules

nova.tests.test_articles_api module

class nova.tests.test_articles_api.ArticleViewSetTests(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: APITestCase

setUp()[source]

Setup the users and article that will be used for testing

test_editor_can_delete_article()[source]

Test that an editor can successfully delete an existing article.

test_editor_can_update_article()[source]

Test that an editor can successfully update an existing article.

test_journalist_can_create_article()[source]

Test if journalists can create articles

test_journalist_can_delete_own_article()[source]

Test if journalist can delete their own articles

test_journalist_cannot_delete_other_articles()[source]

Test if journalist cannot delete their own articles

test_reader_can_list_articles()[source]

Test to see if all articles are displayed

test_reader_subscribed_articles_only()[source]

Test if only readers can see subscribed articles
